title: Execution errors are masked as 'saved as an idea' (systemic prevention P1-P5)

rootCause.summary: The facade high-band path runs the provenance gate unconditionally when a requires_provenance scenario has no sources, regardless of outcome. For a non-OK execution outcome (provider-error/timeout/no-tool-call/schema-failure) the gate rewrites Status to StatusSavedAsIdea + CaptureRoute=true, and canonicalizeSuccessfulCaptureResponse then clears ErrorCause and forces Body='saved as an idea'. A real failure is laundered into a benign capture, invisible to users and alerting. The gate's purpose (anti-fabrication) is only meaningful for an OK outcome that produced a body without valid sources.

resolution: P1: run the provenance gate only on OutcomeOK; a non-OK outcome keeps the honest StatusUnavailable + ErrorCause the facade already computed, with a friendly truthful body, and is not re-canonicalised into the capture acknowledgement. P2: a cross-scenario invariant test over every requires_provenance scenario x error outcome (the mechanical regression gate) plus complementary OK+no-sources cases proving the fabrication guard is intact. P3: an ExecutionErrorSurfacedTotal{scenario,outcome,transport} metric for proactive observability. P4: document the BUG-061-007 deterministic-dispatch seam pattern for explicit commands. P5: encode the invariant in the assistant design + review checklist, with the P2 test as mechanical enforcement.
codeVsDeployment: deployed. The P1-P5 fix (sourceSha 19fe72c8) is built, operator-cosign-signed, deployed on-host (local-operator promote/apply under sudo), and running healthy on the home-lab bot. Running core+ml digests match the P1-P5 build (core sha256:b4a59eef24f2956896710797360f5ef1b3be7a35574819441e116e6c50faed73, ml sha256:c43fad4afc6d86287f5fe93029694dfad85a74fa9281a94bd4f870220fc5d455), both healthy with 0 restarts, Telegram assistant adapter wired and bound. Only the operator's behavioral Telegram smoke test remains.

deployment.runningVerification: docker inspect (read-only): smackerel-home-lab-smackerel-core-1 running/healthy restarts=0 digest MATCHES P1-P5 CORE (b4a59eef); smackerel-home-lab-smackerel-ml-1 running/healthy restarts=0 digest MATCHES P1-P5 ML (c43fad4a); core startup log shows 'telegram bot started' + 'assistant Telegram adapter wired and bound to bot'; Trivy CRITICAL/HIGH gate 0 CVEs on the build
deployment.operatorSmokeTestPending: on Telegram, trigger a scenario execution failure (weather/retrieval while the local model is flaky) and confirm the reply is an honest 'couldn't do that right now' line, NOT 'saved as an idea'; a genuine low-confidence capture should still say 'saved as an idea'

affectedSurface: internal/assistant/facade.go (gate on OK outcome; friendly error body; P3 metric increment)
docs (P4 deterministic-dispatch pattern; P5 invariant + review checklist)

gatesPassed: build --target self-hosted: Trivy 0 CVEs, cosign-signed, SBOM+attest, signed local-build-manifest (sourceSha 19fe72c8)
